themes.title: Performance Optimization
themes.description: Focus on improving load times and API response times.

themes.title: User Engagement and Training
themes.description: Enhancing user experience through feedback and training.

themes.title: Compliance and Monitoring
themes.description: Ensuring accessibility and monitoring performance metrics.

milestones.name: MVP Performance Fixes
milestones.description: Address critical performance issues in the dashboard and API.
milestones.success_criteria: Achieve a 30% reduction in dashboard load time and API latency.

milestones.name: V1 Performance Enhancements
milestones.description: Implement performance enhancements based on MVP findings.
milestones.success_criteria: Resolve all critical performance regressions and improve user satisfaction by 20%.

milestones.name: V2 User Engagement Features
milestones.description: Introduce user feedback collection and training mechanisms.
milestones.success_criteria: Collect feedback from at least 50% of users and provide training to 80% of new users.

milestones.name: V2 Compliance and Monitoring
milestones.description: Ensure accessibility compliance and implement performance monitoring.
milestones.success_criteria: Achieve 100% compliance with accessibility standards and establish monitoring metrics.

sequencing.reason: V1 performance enhancements depend on the successful resolution of MVP performance issues.
User engagement features in V2 require the completion of V1 performance enhancements.
Compliance and monitoring features in V2 depend on the implementation of user engagement features.

mvp.goal: Establish a baseline for performance improvements.

v1.goal: Enhance performance based on MVP findings.

v2.goal: Improve user engagement and ensure compliance.
